title: T3SCH5 Spousal or Common-Law Partner Trust's Capital Gains Deduction in Year of Beneficiary's Death - Canada.ca
content:
## T3SCH5 Spousal or Common-Law Partner Trust's Capital Gains Deduction in Year of Beneficiary's Death
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Use this schedule to calculate a resident spousal or common-law partner trust's capital gains deduction for the tax year in which the beneficiary spouse or common-law partner died.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (t3sch5-fill-15e.pdf) Previous years: Accessible Fillable PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2014 – Fillable PDF (t3sch5-fill-14e.pdf) 2013 – Fillable PDF (t3sch5-fill-13e.pdf) 2012 – Fillable PDF (t3sch5-fill-12e.pdf)
